Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to merge logs A and B Both logs have the same order ID Order1234

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to align events based on order_id and timing tolerance say 2 seconds

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Log A has 5 events Order Received Order Validated Payment Processed Item Shipped Item Delivered Log B has 5 events OrderReceived OrderValidation PaymentCheck Quality Check Shipping

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Log A also has Item Delivered at 102000Z which is not in Log B And Log B has Quality Check at 100300Z which is not in Log A

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Timestamp mismatches we have small differences For Received A 100000 B 095958 2 sec diff For Validated A 100130 B 100129 1 sec diff For Payment Processed A 100200 B 100205 5 sec diff For Shipping A 100500 B 100502 2 sec diff

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If we use 2 seconds tolerance strictly then Payment is off by 5 seconds and we might not match them resulting in separate events

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Maybe we can consider it same event because its the only payment event However there is no other payment event in Log B maybe it is indeed the same

Name: Validation - PE
Text: There is no other payment event in either log that would match

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Given the business process Payment Processed and PaymentCheck likely correspond to the same event even with 5 seconds difference because its the only payment related event in both logs

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Quality Check in B has no corresponding A event so its separate Delivery in A only

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For each event in A try to find an event in B with same order_id and similar timestamp and semantically matching event type Order Received matches OrderReceived Order Validated matches OrderValidation Payment Processed matches PaymentCheck Item Shipped matches Shipping

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Delivery has no B match Then B Quality Check is unmatched

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Final merged log will have 6 events 4 merged events plus 1 B only event Quality Check plus 1 A only event Item Delivered

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Use the event_type from Log A as canonical because it is primary and more descriptive Map OrderReceived to Order Received OrderValidation to Order Validated PaymentCheck to Payment Processed Shipping to Item Shipped

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Because Log A is considered the primary timeline for merged events use its timestamp as the primary timestamp for ordering and keep the timestamp from Log B as an additional attribute

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Ordering is Order Received at 100000 Order Validated at 100130 Payment Processed at 100200 Quality Check at 100300 Item Shipped at 100500 Item Delivered at 102000
